actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We can scaffold ideas on top of each other.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: We put our faith in them, and they keep us alive.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: f our ancestors keep us insulated fro.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We put our faith in science, and the ideas of previous ancestors keep us alive and comfortable today.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Do not be resistant to change, as outdated ideas can be torn down with relative ease.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Our knowledge of the world protects us from the chaos around us.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Human ingenuity can always be improved upon.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Some ideas tower above all others.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Every plan needs a strong foundation.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Strong dissent can topple any good idea if it's not fortified.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: New ideas must be well thought out to weather the storm of criticism they will receive.

actions.name: text-insert
actions.text: We'll just have to hope that they hold up.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: We'll just have to hope that our evidence holds up against the elements.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: Some old beliefs have stood the test of time, while others were torn to ruins.

actions.name: text-delete
actions.text: You can't construct a fact based on a weak idea.
